To do this, Neto will send AdScale:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sales orders (conversion tracking)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Products (advertising optimisation)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product categories (advertising optimisation)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The links below provide more information about how AdScale works."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.adscale.com/en/articles/4361943-creating-a-new-campaign", "children": [{"text": "Create a Campaign"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.adscale.com/en/", "children": [{"text": "AdScale Help Centre"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install and Set up the AdScale Add-on"}], "data-id": "install-and-set-up-the-adscale-add-on"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the AdScale add-on for your Neto control panel:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the AdScale add-on in the Marketing section, and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the pop-up window to confirm."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The add-on will be installed. When complete, click the "}, {"text": "Configure AdScale", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Follow the steps to create an AdScale account. Setup documentation provided by AdScale is available "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://help.adscale.com/en/collections/3674974-creating-ads", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}]
